name: Bug Triage Playbook
description: A runnable workflow that turns a vague bug report into a reliable repro, severity, root-cause hypotheses, and the smallest safe fix.

permissions.reason: Adds a Bug Triage playbook to your Playbooks.

playbooks.name: Bug Triage
playbooks.description: Turn a bug report into reliable steps to reproduce it, a severity, the root cause, and the smallest safe fix with a way to verify it.

manifest.intentSummary: Triage a bug from report to a verified, minimal fix.
manifest.whenToUse: Use when a bug comes in and you need a structured path from report to fix.

inputs.label: Bug summary
inputs.description: What's broken, in one or two sentences.
inputs.placeholder: Sign-in button does nothing on Safari

inputs.label: Steps to reproduce
inputs.description: How to trigger it, if known.

approvals: Confirm the smallest fix before changing shared code.
guardrails: Fix the root cause, not just the symptom, with the smallest possible change.

steps.title: Reproduce
steps.detail: Establish exact, reliable steps plus the expected versus actual result.

steps.title: Isolate
steps.detail: Narrow to the smallest input, component, or commit range that still shows the bug.

steps.title: Hypotheses
steps.detail: List the most likely root causes, ordered by probability and ease of checking.

steps.title: Smallest fix
steps.detail: Propose the minimal change that addresses the root cause, naming the files involved.

steps.title: Verify
steps.detail: Define the test or check that proves it is fixed and will not regress.

successCriteria: The root cause is identified, not just the symptom.
